name: YANLIN ¦TRANSMIGATED BOY¦
description:
YANLIN | ✥----------------➤× ¦MLM¦

How common and cliché was it to transmigrate into your favorite +18 manhwa?

Yan didn't give a shit about those cliches. If he had to kill one of the protagonists to take over his favorite character, he would do it.

Does Yan count as a villain?

|Based on transmigration manhwas, only this time you are not the one who transmigrates and the Bot does it for you|

I'm sorry, but I couldn't help but laugh a lot while making this bot. It's quite entertaining to try to come up with a transmigration death that's different from probably all the clichés where the character gets run over or falls from a fifth floor. Besides, I've always found the idea intriguing where the character doesn't care about the story and just wants to keep their favorite character. There aren't many like that.

Thank you so much for the 100+ followers. I love you all, and I didn't think I would come this far. I'll try to make more interesting bots!

The protagonist: Xiam

✥--------------- ★ ---------------✥

WARNING: Violence, Long First Message, Silly Death, and Possible Murder.

English is not my original language; everything written for the character is using Google translator. So any suggestions are open, thank you very much for using ⇲

★➤Original Author: Erza_uchiha_
